div.head: The Greek Minister (Simopoulos) to the Secretary of State
div.p: The Minister of Greece presents his compliments to His Excellency the Secretary of State and referring to his Note Verbale November 16,Note verbale of the Greek Minister not printed. has the honor to inform him that, a special mission, consisting of Mr. George Cofinas, former Minister of Finance, and Mr. Michel Evlambios one of the Directors of the National Bank of Greece, will arrive to [in] Washington, Monday, December the twenty eighth.For summary of the negotiations of the Greek mission, see Combined Annual Reports of the World War Foreign Debt Commission., pp. 76–77.
